research.summary: Ahlsell acquires specialist in pump technology in Norway. https://www. ahlsell. no/om-ahlsell/pressemeldinger/2022/ahlsell-acquires-specialist-in-pump-technology-in-norway/ Er du sikker på at du vil tømme listen? Er du sikker på at du vil tømme innkjøpslisten? Ahlsell has signed an agreement to acquire all shares in Intec Pumper AS.

outreach_notes: 该公司为Tier1-Nordic重要目标。建议联系出口/采购负责人，强调 Farreach 的 OEM 产能优势（越南工厂月产 80 万件）和价格竞争力。
